subject: english
description: this / here / now などの指示語や時の表現は間接話法で過去を指す語に変わります。

questions.question: "I will come tomorrow." → He said he would come ___.
questions.explanation: tomorrowは the next day に変わります

questions.question: "I came here yesterday." → He said he had come ___ the day before.
questions.explanation: hereは there に変わります

questions.question: "I am busy now." → He said he was busy ___.
questions.explanation: nowは then に変わります

questions.question: "I like this book." → He said he liked ___ book.
questions.explanation: thisは that に変わります

questions.question: "I will do it today." → He said he would do it ___.
questions.explanation: todayは that day に変わります

questions.question: yesterdayは間接話法で何に変わる？
questions.explanation: yesterdayは the day before に変わります

questions.question: "I was here last week." → He said he had been ___ the week before.
questions.explanation: hereは there に変わります

questions.question: "I want these books." → He said he wanted ___ books.
questions.explanation: theseは those に変わります
